game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Beat the Boss 2 (17+):** Players inflict damage upon a stationary boss character across 7 interactive stages, primarily by tapping the screen to activate the currently equipped weapon or swiping for specific weapon actions like dragging a blade or aiming a projectile. The core objective is to deplete the boss's health bar, which resets upon stage completion, allowing progression to the next, more resilient boss. In-game currency, earned from each successful hit and by completing "funny player objectives" (e.g., "Hit the boss 50 times with a rubber chicken"), is used to unlock over 80 unique weapons and upgrade their damage output by 10% per level. Each weapon possesses distinct damage values, attack animations, and physics-based reactions, providing varied visual and tactile feedback. Difficulty scales as bosses gain increased health and damage resistance in subsequent stages, encouraging players to unlock and upgrade their arsenal to maximize damage per second.
game_info.description: Battle through 7 increasingly challenging boss stages in this action-packed damage dealer! Unleash a massive arsenal of unique weapons to deplete each boss's health bar. Earn currency from hits and by completing humorous objectives to unlock 80+ weapons and upgrade their damage. Each weapon features distinct physics-based reactions and animations. Strategically manage your arsenal as bosses grow tougher with more health and resistance!
game_info.controls:
SPACE: Attack with current weapon
LEFT/RIGHT ARROW: Switch between unlocked weapons
UP ARROW: Purchase weapon upgrade (in shop)
DOWN ARROW: Purchase new weapon (in shop)
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to title screen

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic combat mechanics, weapon switching, and damage dealing. Verifies that the player can attack the boss, deal damage, and switch between weapons. Confirms health bars update correctly and currency is earned from hits.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Continuously attack with SPACE key at regular intervals (every 15 frames). Switch weapons periodically using LEFT/RIGHT arrows every 60 frames to test weapon rotation. Continue attacking until boss health reaches zero or 300 frames elapse.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Boss health should decrease with each hit. Currency should increase. Weapon switching should work smoothly. Boss should show damage feedback (visual reactions). Test succeeds if damage is consistently applied and weapons can be switched without errors.
